nodes.label: Case Detail Drawer Screenshot
nodes.summary: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app case detail drawer panel sliding in from the right side, overlaying the Kanban-style cases board. Shows a case named 'استحواذ صيديليات الخليج' (Al-Khaleej Pharmacies Acquisition) with tabbed navigation (overview, tasks, documents, hours, contacts, invoices). Displays client info, deadline (23 June 2026, 2 days remaining), estimated value (SAR 1,200,000), color-coded tags (شركات, عاجلة, مراجعة العميل), a notes field, and total billable hours. RTL Arabic layout with a close button and PWA-enabled indicator in the footer.

properties.background_view: Kanban cases board with columns مغلقة and مرفوعة

nodes.label: Case Detail Drawer UI Pattern
nodes.summary: Design pattern: a right-side sliding drawer that reveals full case details (tabs for tasks, documents, hours, contacts, invoices) while keeping the Kanban board visible in the background. Uses color-coded status tags, deadline countdown, and a monetary estimated-value field. Supports RTL Arabic layout.
